characters.bio: Old money, still pretends he isn't bored. Treats the town like a country house.
Third-generation industrialist. Loves a working chimney.
Property magnate with Modernist tastes and a quiet radio habit.
High-street retail operator with a nose for fashion cycles.
Motor trade lifer. Can fix anything with wheels and a chequebook.
Civic-minded pragmatist. Wants your town safe, healthy, and insured.
Retailer-in-chief. Can sell anything if the margin's right.
Runs the food-production side. Obsessed with provenance and yield.
Cares about the density debate more than she cares to admit.

patrons.bio: A loose league of aristocrats who see the town as their weekend playground. Promises you the Theatre they've always wanted to fund.
A consortium of local businessmen with civic pretensions. Will co-fund the Sports Centre if the town proves it can be run like a business.
The old families that owned the land before you turned up. They'll donate pasture for a Theme Park — a very specific pasture.
